ab: saabaw, lri langay su ku manemane?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: lri langadha ku ku vaeva ku kupu.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: saabaw, lri langay su ku manemane?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: lri langadha ku ku veva ku talrupunu.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: lrilangadha ku ku kupu, kialangalangay numi?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: yakay, lri ngupia su langay?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: kialangalangay numi ku sabiki?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: kadrua, kai nay kialangalangay ku sabiki.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: lrilangadha ku ku pagay.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: lringu akupia su langay?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: tabaadhay li ku akutulru ki lumase.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: lri langadha ku ku vurasi
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: maelemenga ku vurasi.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: lri langadha ku ku laulaw.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: lri langadha ku ku abera.
akuvaevanga kay tedrane.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: lu paralubay li langay ku batuku.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: lri ngupia su ki tingitingi?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: lringupia su ki tingitingi ku batuku?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: lri ngudrusa ku ki tingitingi.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: lri langadha ku ngudrusa ku kucay.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: tutulrunga kay yakay, naw baainga musuane.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: kikay yalumasane kay pagay lrika pia?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: ku akuvaeva drusa ka iday.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: elreelrenga mapusale si vaeva ka balrulane,anika mapuapusalenga ka balrulane.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: inilringa.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: kikay mabangate si lrima ka balrulane.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: naw padriadrima, pakela ki iday ka balrulane.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: paelreelrenga lrima ka iday si mangeale ka balrulane.
en: A:All $510.

ab: ala tulrialrima ili ka iday?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: kikay makucingalrenga, lri dulru aru pakaduayana?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: ini, kikay maduaynga turamuru.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: lri malra ku kikay bisikitu.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: kikay bisikitu matulrulu ka balrulane,yakayyana ku murikay su?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
